reviews.review_description:
It was cool but spent a lot of time circling that first building over and over.  Seeing Vegas at night from a helicopter was great but the darkness and all the neon made it a little hard to figure out what some of the locations were. 
Many things were blurred because of this

It would also be great to see the same area during a sunny day. 

How about adding the ability to take the controllers and point at a location and have it show me the name.

developer_response.body: Thx for review. I`m working on the next version.
